chat.title: Genie ✨ Your Beauty Genie
chat.subtitle: Your Beauty Genie
chat.welcome: Hi lovely! I'm Genie, your GENOSYS Beauty Genie! ✨ Your wish for beautiful skin is my command! Ask me anything about Korean dermacosmetics, routines, or ingredients - I'm here to help! 💫
chat.errorMessage: Oops! Even genies have off moments. Please try again! 💫
chat.rateLimited: Please wait a moment before sending another message.
chat.contextWeekend: Happy weekend! Perfect time for some skincare self-care 💆‍♀️✨
chat.contextMorning: Ready to start your day with glowing skin? 🌟
chat.contextAfternoon: How can I help with your skincare today? 💫
chat.contextEvening: Evening is perfect for skincare rituals! 🌙✨
chat.contextNight: Night is when your skin regenerates most! 💤✨
chat.quickDrySkinQuery: What products do you recommend for dry skin?

product.pc19Intro: Strengthen and protect your sensitive skin by combining the {currentName} with {recommendedName}. Together, they provide comprehensive barrier repair and protection for calm, resilient skin.
product.pc19Benefit1Text: MultiEx BSASM® Plus in both products works together to restore and strengthen the skin barrier
product.pc19Benefit2Text: Serum provides anti-inflammatory relief while cream creates a protective barrier against irritants
product.pc19Benefit3Text: Ceramides and amino acids in cream lock in hydration provided by serum's hyaluronic acid
product.pc19Benefit4Text: Addresses both immediate soothing needs and long-term barrier health for sensitive skin
product.pc24Intro: Complete your eye care routine by combining the {currentName} with {recommendedName}. Together, they provide comprehensive eye contour treatment for wrinkles, dark circles, and eye puffs.
product.pc24Benefit1Text: Same peptide complex (Palmitoyl Hexapeptide-12, Copper Tripeptide-1, Acetyl Hexapeptide-8) in both products works together for enhanced wrinkle reduction
product.pc24Benefit2TextSerumFirst: Serum prepares eye contour area for deeper cream penetration and optimal ingredient delivery
product.pc24Benefit2TextCreamFirst: Cream locks in serum's active ingredients for prolonged treatment and protection
product.pc24Benefit3TextSerumFirst: Serum for active treatment while cream provides daily protection and maintains results
product.pc24Benefit3TextCreamFirst: Cream provides daily protection while serum delivers intensive treatment for optimal results
product.pc24Benefit4Text: Addresses wrinkles, dark circles, and eye puffs comprehensively for younger-looking eye contour

product.pc33Benefit3Text: Patch provides cooling, soothing, and moisturizing while serum targets wrinkles, dark circles, and eye puffs
product.pc33Benefit4Text: Serum for daily use and patch for intensive treatment sessions provide comprehensive eye care routine
product.pc44Intro: Complete your hair loss treatment routine by combining the {currentName} with {recommendedName}. Together, they provide comprehensive scalp care and hair loss improvement for healthier, stronger hair.
product.pc44Benefit1Text: Both products are KFDA-approved functional products that work together to improve hair loss symptoms and scalp health
product.pc44Benefit2TextShampooFirst: Shampoo cleanses and controls excess sebum while tonic cools scalp heat and improves scalp conditions

product.pc44Benefit3TextShampooFirst: Copper Tripeptide-1 and MultiEx BSASM™ in tonic complement shampoo's patented extracts for enhanced hair loss treatment

product.pc44Benefit4Text: Addresses both cleansing/preparation and active treatment for comprehensive hair loss management

help.title: Help & Support
help.heroSubtitle: Find answers to common questions or get in touch with our support team

faqItems.a1: GENOSYS is a professional Korean dermacosmetics brand distributed by GENOSYS Middle East FZ-LLC in the UAE. We offer premium skincare products and microneedling devices for professional use. Our products are certified by Dubai Municipality and are suitable for licensed practitioners and professional beauty clinics.
faqItems.q2: Do you ship to all UAE emirates?
faqItems.a2: Yes, we ship to all 7 UAE emirates: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, and Umm Al Quwain. Shipping costs vary by emirate, and orders over 1000 AED qualify for free shipping. Delivery typically takes 1-3 business days depending on your location.
faqItems.q3: Are GENOSYS products suitable for home use?
faqItems.a3: GENOSYS offers both professional-grade products for licensed practitioners and homecare products for personal use. Please check product descriptions for usage guidelines. Some products are specifically designed for professional treatments and should only be used by trained practitioners.
faqItems.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faqItems.a4: We accept Cash on Delivery (COD) and payment via Stripe checkout online (Apple Pay/Credit and Debit cards) for all orders. The link for payment is generated by our support team once the order is placed.
faqItems.a5: Shipping times vary by emirate: Dubai, Sharjah (1-2 hours by Careem), Abu Dhabi and other emirates (48 hours via Quiqup). We process all orders on the same day. Free shipping is available for orders over 1000 AED.
faqItems.q6: Can I return or exchange products?
faqItems.a6: We accept returns and exchanges within 7 days of delivery for unopened products in their original packaging. Please contact our support team at sales@genosys.ae or WhatsApp +971 58 548 76 65 to initiate a return or exchange.
faqItems.a7: Yes, we offer comprehensive professional skincare training for licensed practitioners, clinics and beauty salons. Our training includes microneedling techniques, product application methods, treatment protocols, on-site training, live product demonstrations, hands-on treatment sessions, and personalized team guidance.
faqItems.a8: Yes, all GENOSYS products are certified by Dubai Municipality and comply with UAE regulations. We are the official distributor of DTS MG Co., Ltd. Korea in the UAE, ensuring authentic and certified products.
faqItems.q9: How do I track my order?
faqItems.a9: Once your order is confirmed, you will receive an order confirmation email with your order number. Our support team will contact you via phone, email, or WhatsApp to confirm delivery details. You can also contact us directly with your order number for updates.
faqItems.a10: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery for unopened products. Products must be in their original packaging and unused. Refunds will be processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned items.
faqItems.a11: Yes, we offer discounts for bulk orders and professional accounts. Registered users may be eligible for special pricing based on their account type. Contact our sales team at sales@genosys.ae to discuss bulk order pricing.
faqItems.q12: How do I become a registered user?
faqItems.a12: You can register for an account on our website by clicking the "Login" button and selecting "Register". Registration is free and gives you access to product pricing, professional training materials, and exclusive member benefits.
faqItems.q13: Are your products suitable for sensitive skin?
faqItems.a13: Many GENOSYS products are formulated for sensitive skin, but we recommend consulting with a dermatologist or skincare professional before use. Product descriptions include information about skin types and target concerns. Always perform a patch test before first use.
faqItems.a14: Currently, GENOSYS Middle East FZ-LLC only ships within the United Arab Emirates. However, we have offices around the globe, and GENOSYS products are likely available in your country through our international network of distributors.
faqItems.q15: How can I contact customer support?
faqItems.a15: You can reach our customer support team via email at sales@genosys.ae, WhatsApp at +971 58 548 76 65, Instagram at @genosys.uae, or through our contact page. Our support team is available Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 9 PM UAE time.
faqItems.a16: GENOSYS stands out for several key reasons: Skin-friendly formulations, highly effective products, affordable pricing strategy, same-day delivery, certified and authentic products, expert support, and comprehensive product range.
faqItems.a17: Yes! Our GENOSYS Blog features expert insights on Korean skincare, professional dermacosmetics, beauty industry trends, and product information. Learn about the latest innovations, skincare tips, ingredient benefits, and treatment protocols.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.rightsText: As a registered user, you have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. This section outlines how we handle your data and your rights under our privacy policy.

personalInfo.title: 1. Personal Information We Collect
personalInfo.orderText: Purchase history, shipping addresses, payment details
personalInfo.usageText: Website interactions, page views, session data

google.title: 2. Google Authentication (OAuth)
google.signInText: When you sign in with Google, we receive your basic profile information (name, email, profile picture) from Google according to your Google account privacy settings.
google.sharedText: We only receive information that you have made publicly available in your Google profile or that you explicitly consent to share during the authentication process.
google.privacyPrefix: Google's use of your information is governed by their privacy policy. You can review it at:

apple.title: 3. Apple Sign‑In
apple.signInText: When you sign in with Apple, we may receive your name and email address (depending on what you choose to share). Apple may provide a private relay email address instead of your real email address.
apple.sharedText: We use the information received from Apple to create or sign you into your account and to identify your account in our system. We do not receive your Apple ID password.
apple.privacyPrefix: Apple's use of your information is governed by their privacy policy. You can review it at:

genosys.title: Genosys Privacy Policy
genosys.prefix: You can review the Genosys Privacy Policy here:

contact.title: 4. Contact Us
contact.text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

agreement.title: Agreement to Terms
agreement.p1: By accessing and using the Genosys mobile application, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.

useLicense.title: Use License
useLicense.p1: Permission is granted to temporarily use the Genosys mobile application for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
useLicense.b2: Use the materials for commercial purposes or public display
useLicense.b3: Attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software
useLicense.b4: Remove any copyright or proprietary notations

accountTerms.title: Account Terms
accountTerms.p1: When you create an account with us, you must provide information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times.
accountTerms.b1: You are responsible for safeguarding your password
accountTerms.b2: You must not share your account with others
accountTerms.b3: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use
accountTerms.b4: We reserve the right to terminate accounts that violate these terms

products.title: Products and Services
products.p1: All products are subject to availability. We reserve the right to discontinue any product at any time.
products.b1: Product descriptions and prices are subject to change without notice
products.b2: We make every effort to display accurate colors and images
products.b3: Results from skincare products may vary by individual
products.b4: Professional consultation is recommended for sensitive skin conditions

orders.title: Orders and Payment
orders.p1: By placing an order, you agree to provide current, complete, and accurate purchase information.
orders.b1: All prices are in UAE Dirhams (AED)
orders.b2: Payment is required at the time of order
orders.b3: We accept major credit cards and approved payment methods
orders.b4: Orders are subject to product availability
orders.b5: We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order

shipping.title: Shipping and Delivery
shipping.p1: We currently ship within the United Arab Emirates only.
shipping.b1: Delivery times are estimates and not guaranteed
shipping.b2: Risk of loss transfers to you upon delivery
shipping.b3: Additional charges may apply for remote areas
shipping.b4: Someone must be available to receive the package

returns.title: Returns and Exchanges
returns.p1: We accept returns and exchanges within 7 days of delivery for unopened products in their original packaging. Please contact us to initiate a return or exchange.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: Your privacy is important to us. Our Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our service. By using our service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Uses
prohibited.p1: You may not use our service for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform unlawful acts:
prohibited.b1: Violate any international, federal, provincial, or state regulations or laws
prohibited.b2: Transmit or procure the sending of any advertising or promotional material
prohibited.b3: Impersonate or attempt to impersonate the company or another user
prohibited.b4: Use the service in any way that could damage or overburden the service

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers
disclaimers.p1: The information on this mobile application is provided on an "as is" basis. To the fullest extent permitted by law, this company excludes all representations, warranties, and conditions relating to our app and the use of this app.
disclaimers.p2: Individual results from skincare products may vary. Consult with a healthcare professional before use if you have any medical conditions or skin sensitivities.

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.p1: In no event shall Genosys or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on the app, even if Genosys or an authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.p1: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates, and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Dubai, UAE.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.p1: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will try to provide at least 30 days notice prior to any new terms taking effect.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us:

about.title: About Genosys
about.aboutUsLine1: Genosys Middle East FZ-LLC is an official distributor of DTSMG. Co., Ltd, Korea in the United Arab Emirates.
about.aboutUsLine2: All products are manufactured in Seoul, South Korea and certified by Dubai Municipality.
about.missionText: To provide exceptional beauty products and services that enhance our customers' confidence and natural beauty, while maintaining the highest standards of quality and customer satisfaction.
about.footerCopyright: © 2026 Genosys Middle East FZ-LLC. All rights reserved.
